# timer register map

<!-- GENERATED by reggen. Do not edit by hand; edit the YAML spec and regenerate. -->

A simple 32-bit down-counter timer with interrupt.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Data width | 32 bits |
| Address width | 8 bits |
| Base address | 0x4000 |

## Registers

| Offset | Name | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0x00 | [LOAD](#load) | 0x00000000 | Counter reload value. |
| 0x04 | [VALUE](#value) | 0x00000000 | Current counter value (hardware-driven). |
| 0x08 | [CTRL](#ctrl) | 0x00000000 | Timer control. |
| 0x0C | [INT](#int) | 0x00000000 | Interrupt status. |

### LOAD

**Offset:** 0x00 &nbsp;&nbsp; **Reset:** 0x00000000

Counter reload value.

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 31:0 | LOAD | RW | 0x0 | Counter reload value. |

### VALUE

**Offset:** 0x04 &nbsp;&nbsp; **Reset:** 0x00000000

Current counter value (hardware-driven).

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 31:0 | VALUE | RO | 0x0 | Current counter value (hardware-driven). |

### CTRL

**Offset:** 0x08 &nbsp;&nbsp; **Reset:** 0x00000000

Timer control.

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | ENABLE | RW | 0x0 | 1 = counter running. |
| 1 | MODE | RW | 0x0 |  |
| 2 | TRIGGER | WO | 0x0 | Write 1 to force an immediate reload. |

*MODE values:*
- `0` — **ONESHOT**: Stop at zero.
- `1` — **PERIODIC**: Reload and continue.

### INT

**Offset:** 0x0C &nbsp;&nbsp; **Reset:** 0x00000000

Interrupt status.

| Bits | Field | Access | Reset | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | FLAG | RW1C | 0x0 | Set by HW at terminal count; write 1 to clear. |
| 1 | ACK | RC | 0x0 | Reading acknowledges the pending event. |
